title: Visa card authorisation accepted
preconditions: Payment gateway running; valid Visa test card available
steps: 1. Submit authorisation request with Visa card number (4111111111111111); 2. Include valid expiry and CVV; 3. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=authorised; scheme=VISA returned in response body

title: Mastercard authorisation accepted
preconditions: Payment gateway running; valid Mastercard test card available
steps: 1. Submit authorisation request with Mastercard number (5500005555555559); 2. Include valid expiry and CVV; 3. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=authorised; scheme=MASTERCARD returned in response body

title: AMEX authorisation accepted
preconditions: Payment gateway running; valid AMEX test card available
steps: 1. Submit authorisation request with AMEX card number (378282246310005); 2. Include valid expiry and CVV; 3. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=authorised; scheme=AMEX returned in response body

title: Maestro authorisation accepted
preconditions: Payment gateway running; valid Maestro test card available
steps: 1. Submit authorisation request with Maestro card number (6759649826438453); 2. Include valid expiry and CVV; 3. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=authorised; scheme=MAESTRO returned in response body

title: Unsupported card scheme rejected
steps: 1. Submit authorisation request with UnionPay card number; 2. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 422 or 400; error code=UNSUPPORTED_SCHEME; no authorisation created

title: Scheme detected automatically from card number
preconditions: Payment gateway running; no explicit scheme field in request
steps: 1. Submit authorisation with Visa card number only (no scheme field); 2. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response includes scheme=VISA detected automatically; status=authorised

title: All four schemes process concurrently without interference
preconditions: Payment gateway running; 4 test cards available
steps: 1. Submit 4 simultaneous authorisation requests — one per scheme; 2. Check each response independently
expected_result: All 4 responses HTTP 200; correct scheme returned per request; no cross-contamination

title: Invalid card number returns error not scheme mismatch
steps: 1. Submit authorisation with invalid card number 1234567890; 2. Send to POST /api/transactions/authorise
expected_result: Response HTTP 400; error code=INVALID_CARD_NUMBER; scheme field absent from response

title: Authorised transaction captured within default 7-day window
preconditions: Transaction authorised; capture window set to default 7 days
steps: 1. Authorise a transaction; note authorisation timestamp; 2. Wait or mock time to day 6; 3. Submit capture request to POST /api/transactions/capture
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=captured; captured_at timestamp present

title: Capture attempt after default 7-day window rejected
preconditions: Transaction authorised; capture window set to default 7 days
steps: 1. Authorise a transaction; 2. Mock time to day 8 (past window); 3. Submit capture request
expected_result: Response HTTP 422; error code=CAPTURE_WINDOW_EXPIRED; status remains authorised

title: Capture on final day of default window succeeds
preconditions: Transaction authorised; capture window default 7 days
steps: 1. Authorise transaction at T=0; 2. Mock time to exactly day 7 (boundary); 3. Submit capture
expected_result: Response HTTP 200; status=captured; boundary day accepted

title: Merchant-specific capture window overrides default
preconditions: Merchant configured with custom capture window of 3 days
steps: 1. Authorise transaction under merchant with 3-day window; 2. Submit capture on day 2; 3. Submit second capture attempt on day 4
expected_result: Day 2 capture: HTTP 200 status=captured; Day 4 capture: HTTP 422 CAPTURE_WINDOW_EXPIRED

title: Capture window configurable per merchant via admin API
preconditions: Admin API accessible; merchant exists in system
steps: 1. PUT /api/merchants/{merchant_id}/settings with capture_window_days=14; 2. Authorise transaction under that merchant; 3. Capture on day 10
expected_result: Settings saved; capture on day 10 succeeds with HTTP 200; status=captured

title: Partial capture within window succeeds
preconditions: Transaction authorised for 100 EUR; capture window active
steps: 1. Authorise transaction for 100 EUR; 2. Submit partial capture for 60 EUR within window

title: Full capture after partial capture within window succeeds
preconditions: Transaction partially captured (60 of 100 EUR); window still active
steps: 1. Submit second capture for remaining 40 EUR

title: Capture amount exceeding authorised amount rejected
steps: 1. Submit capture for 150 EUR against 100 EUR authorisation
expected_result: Response HTTP 422; error code=CAPTURE_EXCEEDS_AUTHORISATION; no capture created

title: Voided authorisation cannot be captured
steps: 1. Authorise transaction; 2. Void the authorisation; 3. Attempt capture
expected_result: Response HTTP 422; error code=AUTHORISATION_VOIDED; status=voided unchanged

title: Capture window expiry surfaced in transaction status query
steps: 1. Authorise transaction; 2. Mock time past window; 3. GET /api/transactions/{id}
expected_result: Response includes capture_window_expired=true; capture_deadline timestamp in past
